mapper.select:
SELECT a.dataset_id, a.dataset_name, a.dataset_url, a.update_time, a.upload_user_id, b.user_name FROM powersystem.dataset a,powersystem.user b
AND dataset_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{datasetName}, '%')
AND upload_user_id LIKE CONCAT('%', #{uploadUserId}, '%')
AND DATE_FORMAT(update_time, '%Y-%m-%d') BETWEEN #{updateTimeStart} AND #{updateTimeEnd}
AND a.upload_user_id=b.user_id
order by a.update_time desc
